zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Stewart of Garlies and Dalswinton於1275年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾達爾斯文頓時，他的父親Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies30歲，母親Lady Margaret de Bonkyl26歲。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1340年在蘇格蘭度福利爾達爾斯文頓享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Stewart of Garlies and Dalswinton于1275年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾達爾斯文頓时，他的父亲Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies30岁，母亲Lady Margaret de Bonkyl26岁。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1340年在苏格兰度福利爾達爾斯文頓享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: and
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Canadian Hénault or directly of French Hunault (see Henault 2).
Catalan (Añó): Castilianized form of Anyó, probably from the old personal name Annone.

variants.name: Anno
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Masayuki, Tadashi, Yoshito.
Japanese: written 安野 ‘peaceful plain’. This surname is rare in Japan proper, and may have originated in the Ryūkyū Islands, where it is pronounced   Ano  .

variants.name: Henault
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Emile, Lucien, Martial, Pierre, Camille, Fernand, Laurier, Monique, Normand, Philippe.
French (Hénault): from the ancient Germanic personal name Haginwald, composed of the elements hagin ‘enclosure, protected place’ and wald ‘power, authority’.
Altered form (Hénault) of French Hunault: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hunwald, composed of the elements hun ‘bear cub’ and wald ‘power, authority’. Compare Ano and Eno .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Stuart  , less common as a given name, although more common as a surname.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: From the French version of the surname Stewart. This form was introduced to Scotland in the 16th century by Mary Stuart , Queen of Scots, who was brought up in France. The surname originated as an occupational or status name for someone who served as a steward in a manor or royal household. The Scottish royal family of this name are traditionally supposed to be descended from a family who were hereditary stewards in Brittany before the Conquest. Use as a given name originated in Scotland, but is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Stewart of Garlies and Dalswinton was born in 1275, in Dalswinton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, was 30 and his mother, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, was 26. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1340, in Dalswinton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Stewart of Garlies and Dalswinton est né en 1275, à Dalswinton, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1340, à Dalswinton, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Stewart of Garlies and Dalswinton 1275 in Dalswinton, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies 30 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret de Bonkyl 26. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1340 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Dalswinton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Stewart of Garlies and Dalswinton è nato il nel 1275 nel Dalswinton, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1340, nel Dalswinton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 65 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Stewart of Garlies and Dalswinton(이)가 1275년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 다스윈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret de Bonkyl(은)는 26세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1340년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 다스윈턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Stewart of Garlies and Dalswinton nasceu em 1275, em Dalswinton, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1340, em Dalswinton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Stewart of Garlies and Dalswinton родился в 1275 г. в местности далсвинтон, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1340 г. в местности далсвинтон, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Stewart of Garlies and Dalswinton nació en 1275, en Dalswinton, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1340, en Dalswinton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 65 años.
